dataProvenance.optimalTemp: Kerstetter et al. 2011 (Marine and Coastal Fisheries) — FL Straits PSAT 25–29°C: https://bioone.org/journals/marine-and-coastal-fisheries/volume-3/issue-1/19425120.2011.623990/
dataProvenance.depthPreference: Kerstetter et al. 2011 (75.7% of daytime in top 20m): https://bioone.org/journals/marine-and-coastal-fisheries/volume-3/issue-1/19425120.2011.623990/
dataProvenance.lunarSensitivity: Lopez et al. 2018 (ICES JMS) — increased nocturnal activity around full moon: https://academic.oup.com/icesjms/article/75/2/871/3845292
dataProvenance.weatherSensitivity: FWC + Mourato et al. 2016 — cold-front-driven SE FL run is qualitatively documented; numeric weights derived from this pattern: https://www.nature.com/articles/srep38163
dataProvenance.timeOfDayPreferences: Lopez et al. 2018 (ICES JMS) — peak 11–17h, low at twilight, residual at night: https://academic.oup.com/icesjms/article/75/2/871/3845292
dataProvenance.structurePreferences: Florida Museum + Mourato et al. 2016 — shelf-edge/Gulf-Stream/current-edge association (colorChange → ripCurrent): https://www.nature.com/articles/srep38163
dataProvenance.weeklyPresenceCurve: Kerstetter et al. + FWC + Florida Museum (winter peak Nov-Mar): https://www.floridamuseum.ufl.edu/discover-fish/species-profiles/sailfish/
